title: Sanji Pushes Luffy Away
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Big Mom Pirates, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Sanji as Sanji’s childhood trauma and the political trap around his marriage collide with Luffy’s refusal to abandon him.
scene: Sanji tries to protect the crew by rejecting Luffy, but Luffy refuses to accept a false goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not budging an inch from this spot, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well I'm sure even he's not idiotic enough...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to stay put after seeing an army like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't let even this Mizuame get in my mouth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ain't eating a damn thing... unless it's from Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The head chef won't let me borrow his knives!! I wanted to mutilate my stuffed animal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well then we have a problem here, don't we.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: dolce, Dragee, go get them for her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way, Mama! Every time we give Anana knives,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She manages to pop all our balloons!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's rotten to the core and I'm definitely gonna kill her one day!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah Mama, don't encourage such psychotic behavior like that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahaha!! Everyone has at least 100 or 200 people they want to kill!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just accept that fact and get along, my children!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tomorrow, your big sister pudding will finally be get- ting married.)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The time has finally come to meet... the family of her groom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm happy you were able to make it all the way here, Germa 66!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had some minor issues... but everything will be fine now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seriously though, I've heard so much about you! A cook for pudding's groom? That's just perfect!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, not that it really makes much difference... the main purpose of this marriage is to cement our alliance in stone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as you and I are on the same page, judge... It should be smooth sailing from here on out! HaAHAHA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, I couldn't have said it better myself... However, I shall simply add that the lasting happiness of our children come first and foremost!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wish all the best for tomorrow's ceremony!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guarantee it shall be a day that none of us forgets!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't you dare forget about me:-)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Take as much as you want, little boys,I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How about you guys pipe down for me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, don't be that way :) Let's have a fun, jolly lunch!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyaaahhh...u) how am I... do I please your palette?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We need to talk in private later.

summary: This section advances the Sanji and the Vinsmokes storyline with 62 dialogue beats. Sanji’s family trauma and the forced wedding turn the rescue mission into an emotional test of loyalty.
